Agustin Canobbio.note: A busy wide attacker for Uruguay, useful when the press needs edge and the far-side run has to arrive early.
Agustin Canobbio.noteZh: 卡诺比奥是乌拉圭勤奋的边路攻击手，当压迫需要强度、远侧跑动需要提前到位时很有用。

Brian Rodriguez.note: Rodríguez changes the tempo from wide areas, especially when Uruguay can release him into open grass.
Brian Rodriguez.noteZh: 布赖恩·罗德里格斯能从边路改变节奏，尤其当乌拉圭能把他送进开阔空间时。

Darwin Nunez.note: Uruguay's chaos forward, dangerous when he attacks space first and forces defenders into recovery runs.
Darwin Nunez.noteZh: 努涅斯是乌拉圭制造混乱的前锋，先冲击空间并迫使后卫回追时最危险。

Emiliano Martinez.note: Martínez gives Uruguay a sturdy midfield worker who can win loose balls and keep the next pass moving.
Emiliano Martinez.noteZh: 埃米利亚诺·马丁内斯给乌拉圭带来稳健中场工兵，能赢下松散球并让下一脚传球继续运转。

Facundo Pellistri.note: Pellistri is a natural width option, stretching the right side and still tracking runners behind him.
Facundo Pellistri.noteZh: 佩利斯特里是天然的宽度选择，能拉开右路，同时还能回追身后的跑动。

Federico Valverde.note: Uruguay's engine and tone-setter, able to turn a defensive recovery into a forward surge almost instantly.
Federico Valverde.noteZh: 巴尔韦德是乌拉圭的发动机和节奏标尺，几乎能立刻把防守回收转成向前冲刺。

Federico Vinas.note: Viñas is a penalty-area forward for Uruguay, useful when crosses and second balls become the route in.
Federico Vinas.noteZh: 维尼亚斯是乌拉圭禁区型前锋，当传中和第二落点成为进攻路线时很有用。

Fernando Muslera.note: A veteran goalkeeper presence, Muslera gives Uruguay command and calm if the match turns into survival mode.
Fernando Muslera.noteZh: 穆斯莱拉是老将门将存在感，当比赛进入守势阶段时能给乌拉圭带来指挥和冷静。

Giorgian De Arrascaeta.note: Uruguay's clearest lock-picker, valuable when possession needs a disguised final pass or a cleaner restart.
Giorgian De Arrascaeta.noteZh: 德阿拉斯凯塔是乌拉圭最清晰的破局者，当控球需要隐蔽最后一传或更干净的定位球时很有价值。

Guillermo Varela.note: Varela is a practical right-back option, trusted for wide duels and controlled support rather than constant risk.
Guillermo Varela.noteZh: 巴雷拉是实用型右后卫，可信赖的是边路对抗和可控支援，而不是持续冒险。

Joaquin Piquerez.note: Piquerez gives Uruguay left-footed service from deep and enough edge to defend the same flank.
Joaquin Piquerez.noteZh: 皮克雷斯给乌拉圭提供后场左脚传递，也有足够硬度守住同一侧边路。

Jose Maria Gimenez.note: Giménez is Uruguay's defensive authority, especially when the box gets crowded and every header matters.
Jose Maria Gimenez.noteZh: 希门尼斯是乌拉圭防线权威，尤其在禁区拥挤、每次头球都关键时。

Juan Manuel Sanabria.note: Sanabria gives Uruguay flexible left-side cover, able to step into midfield or keep the flank supplied.
Juan Manuel Sanabria.noteZh: 萨纳夫里亚给乌拉圭提供灵活左侧保障，既能进入中场，也能持续供应边路。

Manuel Ugarte.note: Ugarte is Uruguay's midfield bite, built for stopping counters before they become real danger.
Manuel Ugarte.noteZh: 乌加特是乌拉圭中场硬度来源，专门在反击真正形成威胁前将其截断。

Mathias Olivera.note: Olivera gives Uruguay a left-sided defender who can shift from full-back into a tougher back line.
Mathias Olivera.noteZh: 奥利韦拉给乌拉圭带来左侧防守者，能从边后卫转换进更硬朗的防线。

Matias Vina.note: Viña is another left-side runner, useful when Uruguay want wing-back depth without losing recovery legs.
Matias Vina.noteZh: 比尼亚是另一名左侧跑动点，当乌拉圭想要翼卫深度又不失回追能力时很有用。

Maxi Araujo.note: Araújo gives Uruguay vertical speed on the left, with the timing to arrive as a scorer rather than only a crosser.
Maxi Araujo.noteZh: 阿劳霍给乌拉圭左路带来纵向速度，也有作为得分点而不只是传中手的到位时机。

Nicolas De La Cruz.note: De la Cruz is a connector with bite, linking midfield moves while still joining the first wave of pressure.
Nicolas De La Cruz.noteZh: 德拉克鲁斯是带硬度的连接者，既串联中场推进，也能加入第一波压迫。

Rodrigo Aguirre.note: Aguirre is a robust striker option, useful when Uruguay need a simpler route to goal late in matches.
Rodrigo Aguirre.noteZh: 阿吉雷是强壮的前锋选择，当乌拉圭在比赛末段需要更直接的进球路线时很有用。

Rodrigo Bentancur.note: Bentancur gives Uruguay calm under pressure, turning crowded midfield touches into forward rhythm.
Rodrigo Bentancur.noteZh: 本坦库尔给乌拉圭带来压力下的冷静，能把拥挤中场触球转成向前节奏。

Rodrigo Zalazar.note: Zalazar adds punch between midfield and attack, especially when Uruguay need a pass or shot through traffic.
Rodrigo Zalazar.noteZh: 萨拉萨尔给乌拉圭中前场连接增加冲击，尤其适合在人群中送出传球或射门。

Ronald Araujo.note: Araújo is Uruguay's emergency brake, able to defend huge spaces and still win the physical duel.
Ronald Araujo.noteZh: 罗纳德·阿劳霍是乌拉圭的紧急刹车，能防守大片空间并赢下身体对抗。

Santiago Bueno.note: Bueno gives Uruguay centre-back depth for aerial spells and long defensive stretches.
Santiago Bueno.noteZh: 布埃诺给乌拉圭增加中卫深度，适合应对空中球阶段和长时间防守。

Santiago Mele.note: Mele is a sharper goalkeeper option for reactive games, especially when crosses keep arriving.
Santiago Mele.noteZh: 梅莱是更敏捷的门将选择，尤其适合不断有传中到来的被动比赛。

Sebastian Caceres.note: Cáceres adds mobile centre-back cover, useful when Uruguay need aggression without opening the back door.
Sebastian Caceres.noteZh: 卡塞雷斯增加机动中卫保障，当乌拉圭需要侵略性又不能打开身后空间时很有用。

Sergio Rochet.note: Rochet is Uruguay's reliable tournament goalkeeper, steady with angles and vocal in the box.
Sergio Rochet.noteZh: 罗切特是乌拉圭可靠的大赛门将，站位角度稳定，也能在禁区内出声指挥。
